ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 2 pages. All fields legible.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-26D-464771 which contains no LC-related banking term. Standard verification applies.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 header: 'Fortex International AB' with address 'Vallgatan 22, Gothenburg, Sweden 411 16'

pairing_validation.motivation: Criterion 2 is met: Certificate consignor 'Fortex International AB' is identifiable in the invoice header as the invoice issuer 'Fortex International AB'. Pairing validation passed. Note: Certificate references Order 507390 while invoice references Order 507212 — these are different orders. Certificate consignee 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill' in Ukraine does not appear in the invoice (invoice customer is 'Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD' in Jordan). Despite pairing passing on consignor criterion, the documents clearly pertain to different transactions.

candidates.raw_text: PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill
candidates.normalized_text: pjsc kyiv cardboard and paper mill

candidates.raw_text: 130 Kyivska Str., Obukhiv, Kyiv region, 08703, Obukhiv, Ukraine
candidates.normalized_text: 130 kyivska str., obukhiv, kyiv region, 08703, ukraine

candidates.raw_text:
33 Bales of Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp
FSC Mix Credit
ADMT weight: 65.295
candidates.normalized_text: 33 bales of bleached eucaliputs sulphate bio pulp, fsc mix credit, admt weight: 65.295

candidates.raw_text: Sahab - King Abdullah II Industrial area - Gate 1, Amman, Jordan
candidates.normalized_text: sahab - king abdullah ii industrial area - gate 1, amman, jordan

candidates.source: Invoice page 1, Country of Origin field

candidates.raw_text: Fluting Medium (various), High Performance Testliner, Testliner 3 (various)
candidates.normalized_text: fluting medium, high performance testliner, testliner 3

candidates.raw_text: "The Exporter of the products covered by this document (customs authorization No. SE/TTA/033214) declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of European Community Germany, Netherlands & Switzerland preferential origin"
candidates.normalized_text: european community germany, netherlands & switzerland preferential origin

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'Fortex International AB' anywhere in the invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Exact match found in invoice header: 'Fortex International AB, Vallgatan 22, Gothenburg, Sweden 411 16'. Also found on page 2: 'FORTEX INTERNATIONAL AB'.

comparison_steps.description: Verify company name and country match.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'Fortex International AB, Sweden'. Invoice issuer: 'Fortex International AB, Sweden'. Exact name match after normalization. Country Sweden confirmed in invoice address.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country matches between certificate and invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate consignor country: Sweden. Invoice issuer address: 'Gothenburg, Sweden 411 16'. Country matches exactly.

rules_applied.description: Group structure / consignor name found in invoice
Country check - exact match Sweden = Sweden

consignor.motivation: Certificate consignor 'Fortex International AB' is an exact match with the invoice issuer 'Fortex International AB' found in the invoice header on page 1 and footer on page 2. Country Sweden is confirmed in the invoice address. MATCH.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'Fortex International AB, Vallgatan 22, 41116, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice text: 'Fortex International AB, Vallgatan 22, Gothenburg, Sweden 411 16'. After normalization of city name (GÖTEBORG/Gothenburg are the same city) and postal code format (41116/411 16), the consignor is fully verifiable. Country Sweden appears explicitly in both documents.

comparison_steps.description: Check invoice CUSTOMER/Bill-to field for certificate consignee.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice CUSTOMER field: 'Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD, Amman, Jordan'. Certificate consignee: 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill, Ukraine'. Completely different company and country.

comparison_steps.description: Check invoice CONSIGNED TO field for certificate consignee.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice CONSIGNED TO field: 'Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD, Amman, Jordan'. Certificate consignee: 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill, Ukraine'. Completely different company and country.

comparison_steps.step: 4.2.0.1 - Full text search for consignee name
comparison_steps.description: Search all invoice pages for any occurrence of 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill' or 'Kyiv Cardboard'.
comparison_steps.detail: Searched all invoice text on pages 1 and 2. The name 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill' or any substring thereof ('Kyiv Cardboard', 'Paper Mill') does not appear anywhere in the invoice.
Certificate consignee country: Ukraine. Invoice customer/consigned-to country: Jordan. Countries do not match.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - billing field has priority
Alternative search in all invoice fields and sections

consignee.motivation: Certificate consignee 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill' in Ukraine cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice. The invoice lists 'Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD' in Jordan as both CUSTOMER and CONSIGNED TO. These are completely different companies in different countries. MISMATCH.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill, 130 Kyivska Str., Obukhiv, Kyiv region, 08703, Ukraine'. Invoice CUSTOMER: 'Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD, Sahab - King Abdullah II Industrial area - Gate 1, Amman, Jordan'. Invoice CONSIGNED TO: same as CUSTOMER. Full text search of all invoice pages finds no occurrence of 'Kyiv', 'PJSC', 'Paper Mill' (in context of company name), or 'Ukraine'. The companies are entirely different entities in different countries. Rule 4.2.4: consignee cannot be identified in the invoice → MISMATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers in certificate.
comparison_steps.detail: No article numbers found in certificate. Proceeding to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate and search in invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate goods: 'Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp'. Invoice goods: 'Fluting Medium', 'High Performance Testliner', 'Testliner 3'. These are completely different paper/pulp products. Bleached eucalyptus sulphate pulp is a raw material; Fluting Medium and Testliner are finished/semi-finished corrugated base papers. The identity-bearing main designation 'Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp' cannot be found anywhere in the invoice text.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.5 - Priority 3: Generic description with invoice reference
comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains a generic description with invoice reference.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate does not contain an express reference to an invoice (no 'according to attached invoice' etc.). Certificate references 'Order 507390' but this is an order number, not an invoice reference. Invoice order number is 507212, which is different. This priority does not apply.

comparison_steps.step: Full text search for 'pulp' in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Search invoice for any mention of 'pulp', 'eucalyptus', 'bleached' to rule out hidden matches.
comparison_steps.detail: None of the terms 'pulp', 'eucalyptus', 'eucaliputs', 'bleached', 'sulphate', 'bio pulp' appear anywhere in the invoice text.

goods_description.motivation: Certificate describes '33 Bales of Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp' (raw pulp material). Invoice describes 'Fluting Medium', 'High Performance Testliner', and 'Testliner 3' (finished paper products). These are entirely different products. The identity-bearing main designation 'Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp' is not found anywhere in the invoice. MISMATCH.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate box 6 text: 'Order 507390 / 33 Bales of Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp / FSC Mix Credit / ADMT weight: 65.295'. Invoice DESCRIPTION column lists only: 'Fluting Medium' (various specifications), 'High Performance Testliner', and 'Testliner 3' (various specifications). No substring of the certificate's product description can be matched to the invoice products. Additionally, the order number differs: certificate Order 507390 vs invoice ORDER NO 507212. These documents clearly pertain to different shipments.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate quantity value can be identified in the invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate quantity: Gross 66.000 MT. Invoice total weight: 54.146 MT. The value 66.000 does not appear anywhere in the invoice. The invoice total is 54.146 MT which is a completely different value.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains 'Gross 66.000 MT'. This is the verification-basis quantity.

comparison_steps.detail: The value 66.000 (or 66000) does not appear anywhere in the invoice. Invoice total weight is 54.146 MT. Deviation: 66.000 - 54.146 = 11.854 MT, which is approximately 21.9% — far exceeds the ±0.1% tolerance.

comparison_steps.description: Check if any quantity exceptions 3A-3E apply.
comparison_steps.detail: 3A: Only one invoice, not applicable. 3B: Both values in MT already. 3C: Not a per-unit weight scenario. 3D: Even summing all invoice line weights (8.634+1.422+8.994+1.296+1.880+16.654+3.546+3.584+6.674+1.462 = 54.146 MT) does not equal 66.000 MT. 3E: Same result as 3D. No exception resolves the discrepancy.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check - value 66.000 MT not found in invoice

quantity.motivation: Certificate states Gross 66.000 MT in box 7. Invoice total weight is 54.146 MT. The values differ by 11.854 MT (approximately 21.9%), which far exceeds the ±0.1% tolerance. The value 66.000 does not appear anywhere in the invoice. MISMATCH.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'Gross 66.000 MT'. Invoice total: 'Total Weight Quantity: 54.146 MT'. Attempted sum of all invoice lines: 8.634+1.422+8.994+1.296+1.880+16.654+3.546+3.584+6.674+1.462 = 54.146 MT. This matches the invoice total line but does not match the certificate value. Deviation = (66.000 - 54.146) / 66.000 = 17.96%, far beyond any allowed tolerance. No quantity exception (3A-3E) can resolve this.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin field in invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice page 1 'Country of Origin: Germany, Netherlands, Switzerland'. Invoice page 2 exporter declaration: 'European Community Germany, Netherlands & Switzerland preferential origin'.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate origin 'Brazil' with invoice origins.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate origin: Brazil. Invoice origins: Germany, Netherlands, Switzerland. Brazil does not appear in the invoice origins. Brazil is not an EU member state, so EU normalization (4.5.4.1) does not apply.

rules_applied.description: Origin identification in invoice - Germany, Netherlands, Switzerland found
Final origin verification - Brazil not found in invoice origins

origin.motivation: Certificate states country of origin as 'Brazil'. Invoice states 'Country of Origin: Germany, Netherlands, Switzerland'. Brazil does not appear anywhere in the invoice as an origin. These are completely different origins. MISMATCH.
origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'Brazil'. Invoice Country of Origin field: 'Germany, Netherlands, Switzerland'. Invoice page 2 declaration: 'European Community Germany, Netherlands & Switzerland preferential origin'. Brazil is a South American country and does not appear in any form in the invoice's origin fields. No normalization rule (EU, ISO codes, etc.) can reconcile Brazil with Germany/Netherlands/Switzerland.

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No LC reference found in certificate.
Document A identified as certificate, Document B identified as invoice. Both are separate files. Standard pairing applies.

Criterion 2 met: Consignor 'Fortex International AB' identifiable in invoice. Note: This only validates that the files share a common party — it does not validate that the documents pertain to the same transaction. Subsequent checkpoint verification reveals the documents are for different orders, different consignees, different goods, different quantities, and different origins.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Group structure - consignor name search in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Fortex International AB found in invoice header and footer.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee priority order - billing field priority
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Invoice CUSTOMER: Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD, Jordan. Certificate consignee: PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill, Ukraine. Different companies and countries.
PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill not found anywhere in invoice.
Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp not found in invoice. Invoice contains Fluting Medium, Testliner products.
66.000 MT not found in invoice; invoice total is 54.146 MT.
Sum of all invoice rows = 54.146 MT ≠ 66.000 MT.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Exception 3E - Row weight summation without total
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Invoice has a total line; 3E is for when total is absent. Regardless, sum = 54.146 MT ≠ 66.000 MT.
Brazil not found in invoice origins.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The certificate and invoice might pertain to the same transaction despite different order numbers.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Certificate references Order 507390 while invoice references Order 507212. Combined with completely different consignees (Ukraine vs Jordan), different goods (pulp vs paper), different quantities (66 MT vs 54 MT), and different origins (Brazil vs Germany/Netherlands/Switzerland), these documents clearly pertain to entirely different transactions. The only common element is the consignor (Fortex International AB).

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The word 'pulp' in certificate could be related to 'Fluting Medium' or 'Testliner' in invoice as downstream products.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.3.3, semantic interpretation and industry-based assumptions are not permitted. 'Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp' and 'Fluting Medium' / 'Testliner 3' are different identity-bearing main designations. No substring match exists.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Perhaps PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill and Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD are related entities since both have 'cardboard' in the name.
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.3.1 and 4.2, the system may not assume group relationships or agent relationships. 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill' (Ukraine) and 'Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD' (Jordan) are clearly different legal entities in different countries. Sharing the word 'cardboard' does not establish a relationship.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet och fakturan avser helt olika transaktioner. Certifikatets mottagare är PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill i Ukraina medan fakturan är ställd till Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD i Jordanien. Varubeskrivningen skiljer sig helt: certifikatet avser blekt eukalyptusmassa (Bio pulp) medan fakturan avser Fluting Medium och Testliner (pappersprodukter). Dessutom anger certifikatet ursprungsland Brasilien medan fakturan anger Tyskland, Nederländerna och Schweiz.
summary_of_mismatches: Consignee: Certificate 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill, Ukraine' vs Invoice 'Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD, Jordan' — completely different entities and countries
Goods description: Certificate 'Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp' vs Invoice 'Fluting Medium / Testliner' — entirely different products
Quantity: Certificate 'Gross 66.000 MT' vs Invoice 'Total Weight 54.146 MT' — 21.9% deviation
Country of Origin: Certificate 'Brazil' vs Invoice 'Germany, Netherlands, Switzerland' — completely different origins

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport: Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Fortex International AB, Vallgatan 22, 41116, GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Fortex International AB, Vallgatan 22, Gothenburg, Sweden 411 16
sections.rule_applied: Direct name match — consignor name found in invoice header (4.1.0). Country Sweden verified in both documents (4.1.4).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Fortex International AB' matchar exakt med fakturans utställare. Land Sverige bekräftas i båda dokumenten. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill, 130 Kyivska Str., Obukhiv, Kyiv region, 08703, Ukraine
sections.invoice_value: Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD, Sahab - King Abdullah II Industrial area - Gate 1, Amman, Jordan
sections.rule_applied: Consignee name 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill' not found anywhere in invoice. Invoice CUSTOMER and CONSIGNED TO both state 'Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD, Jordan'. Country mismatch: Ukraine vs Jordan (4.2.3, 4.2.4).
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'PJSC Kyiv Cardboard and Paper Mill' i Ukraina återfinns inte i fakturan. Fakturans kund och mottagare är 'Arab cardboard Manufacturing CO.LTD' i Jordanien. Helt olika företag och länder. MISMATCH.

sections.certificate_value: 33 Bales of Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp, FSC Mix Credit, ADMT weight: 65.295
sections.invoice_value: Fluting Medium (various specifications), High Performance Testliner, Testliner 3 (various specifications)
sections.rule_applied: Identity-bearing main designation 'Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp' not found in invoice. Invoice describes entirely different products: Fluting Medium and Testliner variants (4.3.3, 4.3.8).
sections.motivation: Certifikatet beskriver 'Bleached Eucaliputs Sulphate Bio pulp' (blekt eukalyptusmassa). Fakturan innehåller 'Fluting Medium' och 'Testliner 3' (pappersprodukter). Helt olika produkttyper. Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen kan inte identifieras i fakturan. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Certificate box 7 value 66.000 MT cannot be identified in invoice. Invoice total weight is 54.146 MT — deviation of 21.9% far exceeds ±0.1% tolerance. No quantity exception (3A–3E) resolves the discrepancy (4.4.1, 4.4.3, 4.4.6).
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger Gross 66.000 MT. Fakturans totalvikt är 54.146 MT. Avvikelsen är 11.854 MT (21,9 %), vilket vida överstiger den tillåtna toleransen på ±0,1 %. Inget undantag är tillämpligt. MISMATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Certificate origin 'Brazil' not found in invoice origins 'Germany, Netherlands, Switzerland'. No normalization applies — Brazil is not an EU member state and is entirely unrelated to the invoice's stated origins (4.5.1, 4.5.5).
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland Brasilien. Fakturan anger Tyskland, Nederländerna och Schweiz. Brasilien återfinns inte i fakturans ursprungsangivelser. Helt olika ursprung. MISMATCH.

human_readable_report.conclusion: NOT_IDENTICAL — Dokumenten avser med all sannolikhet helt olika transaktioner. Fyra av fem kontrollpunkter ger MISMATCH: mottagare (helt olika företag och länder), varubeskrivning (helt olika produkter), kvantitet (66 MT vs 54 MT), och ursprungsland (Brasilien vs Tyskland/Nederländerna/Schweiz). Enda matchande punkt är avsändaren (Fortex International AB), som är samma företag men har utfärdat dessa dokument för olika order (507390 vs 507212).

output_quality_checks.notes: 4 checkpoints have MISMATCH status. comparison_result correctly set to NOT_IDENTICAL. This appears to be a case where the wrong invoice was paired with the certificate — the documents share only the consignor (Fortex International AB) but pertain to entirely different orders, customers, goods, quantities, and origins.
